title: Import comments and udpates to tasks from other sources to monday.com
excerpt: There are many sources like excel,jira,asana from where the data is being imported to asana. But along with the tasks, it would be great if the task comments, history, attachements are also imported or migrated to monday…

posts.author: navya (navyasree)
posts.cookedHtml: There are many sources like excel,jira,asana from where the data is being imported to asana. But along with the tasks, it would be great if the task comments, history, attachements are also imported or migrated to monday.com

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like attachments too. provide a filename and point to a folder
